name: Qualified LIFO Liquidation Adjustment

eligibility.description: Requires a 'qualified inventory interruption' as determined by the Secretary and a formal election by the taxpayer to apply the adjustment upon replacement of goods.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a taxpayer to decrease gross income in a year where LIFO inventory was liquidated due to major interruptions (like trade embargoes) if the inventory is replaced within 3 years.
